scripts.typecheck: bun run --cwd control-plane typecheck && bun run --cwd tooling/vertu-flow-kit typecheck
scripts.typecheck:all: bun run --cwd control-plane typecheck && bun run --cwd tooling/vertu-flow-kit typecheck
scripts.lint: bun run --cwd control-plane lint && bun run --cwd tooling/vertu-flow-kit lint
scripts.lint:all: bun run --cwd control-plane lint && bun run --cwd tooling/vertu-flow-kit lint
scripts.test: bun run --cwd control-plane test && bun run --cwd tooling/vertu-flow-kit test
scripts.verify: bun run --cwd tooling/vertu-flow-kit src/cli.ts verify all
scripts.audit:code-practices: bun run --cwd tooling/vertu-flow-kit src/cli.ts audit code-practices
scripts.audit:capability-gaps: bun run --cwd tooling/vertu-flow-kit src/cli.ts audit capability-gaps
scripts.audit:device-readiness: bun run --cwd tooling/vertu-flow-kit src/cli.ts audit device-readiness
scripts.audit:version-freshness: bun run --cwd tooling/vertu-flow-kit src/cli.ts audit version-freshness
scripts.build:android: bun run --cwd tooling/vertu-flow-kit src/cli.ts build android
scripts.build:ios: bun run --cwd tooling/vertu-flow-kit src/cli.ts build ios
scripts.build:desktop: bun run --cwd tooling/vertu-flow-kit src/cli.ts build desktop
scripts.build:matrix: bun run --cwd tooling/vertu-flow-kit src/cli.ts build matrix
scripts.device-ai:download-model: bun run --cwd tooling/vertu-flow-kit src/cli.ts device-ai download-model
scripts.verify:all: bun run --cwd tooling/vertu-flow-kit src/cli.ts verify all
scripts.verify:smoke-control-plane: bun run --cwd tooling/vertu-flow-kit src/cli.ts verify smoke-control-plane
